datasets.CHIRPS: daily precipitation GeoTIFF sampled/aggregated to monthly
datasets.MODIS_MOD11A2: 8-day LST HDF tiles converted from DN to Celsius
datasets.ESA_WorldCover: 10 m land-cover fractions per grid cell

note: The new raw_light dataset zip is inventoried in 03_prepare_raw_light.py. Heavy NetCDF/HDF raster parsing is optional and requires xarray/netCDF4/h5py/pyhdf/rasterio.
